Colgate Total Active Prevention Active Fresh Toothpaste. Clinically Tested. 24 Hour Antibacterial Protection*. 3X More Effective at Fighting a Root Cause**. Designed to remove the plaque that causes bad breath, keeping your mouth fresher^

Colgate Total Active Prevention Active Fresh Toothpaste.
Clinically Tested
24 Hour Antibacterial Protection*
3X More Effective at Fighting a Root Cause**
Designed to remove the plaque that causes bad breath, keeping your mouth fresher†
Helps strengthen, reharden and protect enamel to prevent erosion.
Helps prevent many oral care issues^. This formula contains a unique system that stabilises our active ingredient and is designed for superior^^ performance.
A multibenefit toothpaste

Size: 200g

Flavour: Mint

Directions for use:
Brush thoroughly at least twice a day or as directed by your dental professional. Do not swallow. Rinse with a small amount of water. Not recommended for children 6 years or less. Colgate recommends specially formulated Colgate children's toothpaste. Up to 12 hours of protection against bacteria with 4-weeks continuous use.

*2x daily (every 12 hours) brushing with 4 weeks continued use.
**Fight tartar, cavities and bad breath based on bacterial plaque reduction vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste with 3 months continued use.
^bad breath, cavities, enamel erosion, tartar, plaque, stains, bacteria on gums.
^^vs. a non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste.
†vs. regular fluoride toothpaste.

We've switched to a recyclable tube & carton! Follow local council guidelines for recycling. HDPE 2 plastics or recycle with TerraCycle.



- 3X MORE EFFECTIVE AT FIGHTING A ROOT CAUSE OF ORAL HEALTH ISSUES: (Fight tartar, cavities and bad breath based on bacterial plaque reduction vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste with 3 months continued use.)

- ACTIVE PREVENTION 24 HOUR ANTIBACTERIAL PROTECTION: When used 2x daily (every 12 hours) brushing with 4 weeks continued use.

- CLINICALLY TESTED: Helps prevent many oral care issues (bad breath, cavities, enamel erosion, tartar, plaque, stains, bacteria on gums).

- MOUTH FRESHENING: Designed to remove the plaque that causes bad breath, keeping your mouth fresher (vs. regular fluoride toothpaste).

- STRENGTHENS ENAMEL: Helps strengthen, reharden and protect enamel to prevent erosion.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Remove 10 years of yellow stains* on your teeth and reveal a whiter looking smile with Colgate Optic White Renewal Vibrant Clean Teeth Whitening Toothpaste.

Colgate Optic White Renewal Vibrant Clean Teeth Whitening Toothpaste removes 10 years of yellow stains*

Did you know that yellow stains, as well as other types of stains, can build up on the inside as well as the outside of your teeth? Colgate Optic White Renewal contains 3% hydrogen peroxide, which is clinically proven to whiten your teeth inside and out. Take years off your smile with Colgate Optic White Renewal. Helps to remove stains from coffee, wine and soft drinks.

- Remove 10 years of yellow stains*
- Powered by Hydrogen Peroxide, the whitening ingredient dentists use
- Proven to deeply whiten beyond surface stains
- Enamel safe for daily use

Boxed Contents: 1 x Teeth Whitening Toothpaste
Size: 85g

Causes of tooth discolouration - certain foods and beverages can cause teeth to become discoloured. These include coffee, tea and wine. Smoking also causes teeth to become discoloured.

Types of teeth stains:
1. Extrinsic Stains - an extrinsic tooth stain is a stain on the outer part of the tooth. These stains make their home on your enamel, which is the layer that protects the softer part of the tooth (dentine) underneath. Enamel comes into contact with everything you eat or drink and can adsorb some of the pigment over time, causing a stain.

2. Intrinsic Stains - intrinsic stains happen when pigments become incorporated in the enamel structure. Dentine is naturally darker and more yellow in colour than enamel. Dentine is more visible when enamel is thinned or worn down from abrasion, which can result from hard toothbrushing; or erosion, which can occur from the ingestion of acidic foods and drinks amongst other things.

Teeth whitening treatments - there are many at-home treatment options available including using a whitening toothpaste, mouthwash or whitening pen. Colgate Optic White toothpastes contain hydrogen peroxide. Hydrogen peroxide works by removing extrinsic and intrinsic stains. Other whitening toothpastes use high cleaning silica, which helps to remove surface stains on the outer layer of the teeth.

*With twice daily brushing for 4 weeks. Individual results may vary
